description: Relay timestamp field is absent from the proof public inputs. This is a schema violation — every cross-chain proof submission must include a relay timestamp for the verifier to assess root freshness. A conformant verifier MUST reject this as malformed input.

metadata.author: bolyra-conformance
metadata.notes: publicInputs has only 2 elements (missing the relay timestamp field). The verifier should check input arity before attempting verification. relayTimestamp is null in the vector to indicate absence.
